## Public documentation change

### What changed?

### Why is this useful to Fitlyn users?

## Accuracy

- [ ] The content matches current product behavior.
- [ ] The relevant internal documentation was updated with the product change.
- [ ] Unverified behavior is not presented as fact.
- [ ] `mkdocs build --strict` passes.

## Publication safety

- [ ] No source code, private repository links, architecture, schema, RLS, or migrations.
- [ ] No security findings, incidents, audit details, or exploit instructions.
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, environment values, or internal URLs.
- [ ] No customer data, production exports, or sensitive screenshots.
- [ ] Examples use fictional or test data only.
